exercises.sentence: Cada mañana, yo (poner) la mesa para el desayuno.
exercises.translation: Every morning, I set the table for breakfast.

exercises.sentence: Yo siempre (poner) mis llaves en el mismo lugar al llegar a casa.
exercises.translation: I always put my keys in the same place when I get home.

exercises.sentence: Yo (poner) mucha sal en la sopa porque me gusta el sabor fuerte.
exercises.translation: I put a lot of salt in the soup because I like the strong flavor.

exercises.sentence: ¿Por qué (poner) esa música tan alta en tu habitación?
exercises.translation: Why are you playing that music so loud in your room?

exercises.sentence: Tú (poner) mucho esfuerzo en todos tus proyectos escolares.
exercises.translation: You put a lot of effort into all your school projects.

exercises.sentence: Cuando sales, siempre (poner) una chaqueta para no tener frío.
exercises.translation: When you go out, you always put on a jacket so as not to be cold.

exercises.sentence: Ella (poner) flores frescas en el florero cada fin de semana.
exercises.translation: She puts fresh flowers in the vase every weekend.

exercises.sentence: Él (poner) el libro sobre la mesa antes de empezar a estudiar.
exercises.translation: He puts the book on the table before starting to study.

exercises.sentence: El profesor (poner) un examen difícil a los alumnos hoy.
exercises.translation: The teacher gives a difficult exam to the students today.

exercises.sentence: Nosotros (poner) las bebidas en el refrigerador para que estén frías.
exercises.translation: We put the drinks in the refrigerator so they are cold.

exercises.sentence: Nosotros (poner) todo nuestro empeño en terminar el trabajo a tiempo.
exercises.translation: We put all our effort into finishing the work on time.

exercises.sentence: Cada día, nosotros (poner) nuestras cosas en el casillero común.
exercises.translation: Every day, we put our things in the common locker.

exercises.sentence: Ellos (poner) luces de colores en su jardín durante la Navidad.
exercises.translation: They put colorful lights in their garden during Christmas.

exercises.sentence: Ellas (poner) mucha atención cuando el guía explica la historia.
exercises.translation: They pay a lot of attention when the guide explains the history.

exercises.sentence: Los camareros (poner) los platos rápidamente en las mesas de los clientes.
exercises.translation: The waiters put the plates quickly on the customers' tables.

exercises.sentence: Ayer yo (poner) las maletas en el coche antes de viajar.
exercises.translation: Yesterday I put the suitcases in the car before traveling.

exercises.sentence: Yo (poner) el reloj despertador a las seis de la mañana.
exercises.translation: I set the alarm clock at six in the morning.

exercises.sentence: Al final, yo (poner) mi firma en el contrato de alquiler.
exercises.translation: In the end, I put my signature on the rental contract.

exercises.sentence: ¿Dónde (poner) tú las llaves del coche cuando entraste?
exercises.translation: Where did you put the car keys when you came in?

exercises.sentence: Tú (poner) mucha azúcar en el café sin preguntar primero.
exercises.translation: You put a lot of sugar in the coffee without asking first.

exercises.sentence: Ayer, tú (poner) una película muy aburrida en la televisión.
exercises.translation: Yesterday, you put on a very boring movie on the TV.

exercises.sentence: Ella (poner) una excusa para no ir a la fiesta anoche.
exercises.translation: She made an excuse not to go to the party last night.

exercises.sentence: Él (poner) el retrato de su familia encima de la chimenea.
exercises.translation: He placed his family portrait above the fireplace.

exercises.sentence: El médico (poner) una venda en la herida de su paciente.
exercises.translation: The doctor put a bandage on his patient's wound.

exercises.sentence: Nosotros (poner) mucho orden en la casa después de la limpieza.
exercises.translation: We brought a lot of order to the house after the cleaning.

exercises.sentence: Nosotros (poner) un anuncio en el periódico para vender la bicicleta.
exercises.translation: We put an ad in the newspaper to sell the bicycle.

exercises.sentence: Nosotros (poner) las fotos en el álbum después de las vacaciones.
exercises.translation: We put the photos in the album after the vacation.

exercises.sentence: Ellos (poner) una queja formal sobre el servicio del restaurante.
exercises.translation: They filed a formal complaint about the restaurant service.

exercises.sentence: Ellas (poner) sus abrigos en el armario antes de entrar al salón.
exercises.translation: They put their coats in the closet before entering the room.

exercises.sentence: Los estudiantes (poner) sus exámenes sobre el escritorio al terminar.
exercises.translation: The students put their exams on the desk upon finishing.

exercises.sentence: Antes, yo (poner) la mesa todos los días para mi familia.
exercises.translation: Before, I used to set the table every day for my family.

exercises.sentence: Yo siempre (poner) música clásica mientras estudiaba para mis clases.
exercises.translation: I always used to play classical music while I studied for my classes.

exercises.sentence: De niño, yo (poner) mis juguetes bajo la cama por la noche.
exercises.translation: As a child, I used to put my toys under the bed at night.

exercises.sentence: ¿Por qué (poner) tú siempre excusas cuando no querías estudiar?
exercises.translation: Why did you always make excuses when you didn't want to study?

exercises.sentence: Tú (poner) flores en tu ventana durante todos los veranos.
exercises.translation: You used to put flowers in your window during every summer.

exercises.sentence: Tú (poner) mucha mantequilla en el pan cuando éramos jóvenes.
exercises.translation: You used to put a lot of butter on the bread when we were young.

exercises.sentence: Ella (poner) la radio para escuchar las noticias cada mañana.
exercises.translation: She used to turn on the radio to hear the news every morning.

exercises.sentence: Él (poner) mucho interés en los proyectos de arte en la escuela.
exercises.translation: He used to put a lot of interest in the art projects at school.

exercises.sentence: El perro (poner) sus patas en mi regazo para pedir comida.
exercises.translation: The dog used to put its paws on my lap to ask for food.

exercises.sentence: Nosotros (poner) las bebidas en el balcón para que se enfriaran.
exercises.translation: We used to put the drinks on the balcony so they would cool down.

exercises.sentence: Nosotros (poner) un cartel en la puerta para informar a los vecinos.
exercises.translation: We used to put a sign on the door to inform the neighbors.

exercises.sentence: Nosotros (poner) mucho esfuerzo en ayudar a los más necesitados.
exercises.translation: We used to put a lot of effort into helping those most in need.

exercises.sentence: Ellos (poner) luces en el árbol cada año durante su infancia.
exercises.translation: They used to put lights on the tree every year during their childhood.

exercises.sentence: Ellas (poner) las mesas en el patio cuando hacía buen tiempo.
exercises.translation: They used to set the tables on the patio when the weather was nice.

exercises.sentence: Los niños (poner) sus mochilas en el pasillo al regresar a casa.
exercises.translation: The children used to put their backpacks in the hallway upon returning home.

exercises.sentence: Yo (poner) más plantas en esta sala si hubiera más luz solar.
exercises.translation: I would put more plants in this room if there were more sunlight.

exercises.sentence: Yo (poner) una lavadora extra si tuviera suficiente tiempo hoy.
exercises.translation: I would do an extra load of laundry if I had enough time today.

exercises.sentence: Yo (poner) este cuadro aquí para decorar mejor la pared.
exercises.translation: I would put this painting here to better decorate the wall.

exercises.sentence: ¿Tú (poner) azúcar o miel en tu té si pudieras elegir?
exercises.translation: Would you put sugar or honey in your tea if you could choose?

exercises.sentence: Tú (poner) un poco más de sal a la carne, está desabrida.
exercises.translation: You should put a little more salt on the meat, it's bland.

exercises.sentence: Si fueras el jefe, ¿(poner) tú reglas más estrictas?
exercises.translation: If you were the boss, would you set stricter rules?

exercises.sentence: Ella (poner) una reclamación formal si el producto no llega hoy.
exercises.translation: She would file a formal complaint if the product doesn't arrive today.

exercises.sentence: Él (poner) más dinero en sus ahorros para el futuro.
exercises.translation: He would put more money into his savings for the future.

exercises.sentence: El organizador (poner) las sillas en fila para el evento.
exercises.translation: The organizer would place the chairs in rows for the event.

exercises.sentence: Nosotros (poner) una valla en el jardín para tener más privacidad.
exercises.translation: We would put a fence in the garden to have more privacy.

exercises.sentence: Nosotros (poner) otro ejemplo para que la clase comprenda mejor.
exercises.translation: We would provide another example so the class understands better.

exercises.sentence: Nosotros (poner) todo de nuestra parte para resolver este problema.
exercises.translation: We would put all our effort into solving this problem.

exercises.sentence: Ellos (poner) música ambiental para relajar a los invitados.
exercises.translation: They would play ambient music to relax the guests.

exercises.sentence: Ellas (poner) cortinas nuevas para que la luz no sea tan intensa.
exercises.translation: They would put up new curtains so the light isn't so intense.

exercises.sentence: Los voluntarios (poner) sus ideas en común para mejorar el proyecto.
exercises.translation: The volunteers would pool their ideas to improve the project.

exercises.sentence: Mañana yo (poner) mis libros en la estantería nueva.
exercises.translation: Tomorrow I will put my books on the new bookshelf.

exercises.sentence: Yo (poner) una alarma para levantarme temprano el lunes.
exercises.translation: I will set an alarm to wake up early on Monday.

exercises.sentence: Yo (poner) la televisión a las ocho para ver las noticias.
exercises.translation: I will turn on the television at eight to watch the news.

exercises.sentence: ¿Cuándo (poner) tú las fotos en el marco nuevo?
exercises.translation: When will you put the photos in the new frame?

exercises.sentence: Tú (poner) el nombre en la lista de invitados hoy mismo.
exercises.translation: You will put the name on the guest list today.

exercises.sentence: Tú (poner) mucho interés en tu nuevo trabajo, estoy seguro.
exercises.translation: You will put a lot of interest into your new job, I am sure.

exercises.sentence: Ella (poner) una vela en la mesa para la cena romántica.
exercises.translation: She will put a candle on the table for the romantic dinner.

exercises.sentence: Él (poner) la maleta en el compartimento superior del avión.
exercises.translation: He will put the suitcase in the overhead compartment of the plane.

exercises.sentence: La empresa (poner) nuevos equipos de oficina el próximo mes.
exercises.translation: The company will install new office equipment next month.

exercises.sentence: Nosotros (poner) nuestras ideas por escrito para no olvidarlas.
exercises.translation: We will put our ideas in writing so as not to forget them.

exercises.sentence: Nosotros (poner) el árbol de Navidad en la sala el sábado.
exercises.translation: We will put the Christmas tree in the living room on Saturday.

exercises.sentence: Nosotros (poner) los platos en el lavavajillas después de cenar.
exercises.translation: We will put the dishes in the dishwasher after dinner.

exercises.sentence: Ellos (poner) más seguridad en la puerta del edificio pronto.
exercises.translation: They will put more security at the building door soon.

exercises.sentence: Ellas (poner) mucha dedicación para terminar este proyecto a tiempo.
exercises.translation: They will put a lot of dedication into finishing this project on time.

exercises.sentence: Los dueños (poner) a la venta su casa el próximo año.
exercises.translation: The owners will put their house up for sale next year.
